must-have.title: Must Haves
must-have.prompt: Which criteria are non-negotiable for the idea to work?
examples: Must validate real purchase intent within 3 months
Must comply with current security and data rules
Must let core users reach first value in under 10 minutes

should-have.title: Should Haves
should-have.prompt: Which criteria are important, but not deal breakers?
examples: Should be configurable by the support team

could-have.title: Could Haves
could-have.prompt: Which useful extras can wait until resources allow?
examples: Could deeply integrate with third-party CRMs

wont-have.title: Won't Haves
wont-have.prompt: Which directions are explicitly out of scope?
examples: Won't rely on heavy manual review workflows
Won't depend on unlicensed data sources
Won't trade privacy for short-term growth
